title: FAQ
description: Common client questions about scope, estimates, and delivery.

items.q: Do you work with non-technical clients?
items.a: Yes. I can translate technical trade-offs into business impact, and I’ll propose options with clear pros/cons.
I estimate based on scope and unknowns. For larger work, I prefer milestones with a review point after discovery.
Yes — I ship with a README, setup steps, and a simple runbook so your team can operate the system.

items.q: Can you take over an existing codebase?
items.a: Yes. I’ll start with a short audit to understand architecture, bottlenecks, and risks before changing anything big.
Yes. Retainer engagements work well for iterative improvements and operational support.
